design_system.philosophy: Airbnb-inspired: Warm, Human, Trust-First. The interface should feel like a digital home—welcoming, safe, and intuitive. Prioritize clarity over density.

elements: Large circular button (w-40 h-40) with pulse effect
Patient context 'Ready to care for David?'

online_state.header: Compact patient profile + Shift timer pill
online_state.vitals_row: Horizontal scrollable row of soft-gradient cards (Glassmorphism lite)
online_state.tabs: Segmented control (Today / Requests) with sliding indicator
online_state.task_list: Vertical list of large, tappable cards with checkbox interactions

sections.timeline: Instagram-story style feed of care events
sections.cards: Rich media cards showing photos of care (meals, walks) with timestamp and caregiver attribution

Navigation.style: Floating bottom bar with blur effect
Navigation.active_state: Bold icon + Label, Inactive: Grey icon

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Manrope' font via Google Fonts import in index.css
Implement the 'Uber GO' button with CSS animations (pulse)
Ensure all touch targets are at least 44px
Use 'backdrop-blur-xl' for the bottom navigation and modals
Use the provided image URLs for avatars and task evidence
